questions.q: Lucy has 3 apples 🍎 and her mum gives her 4 more. How many apples does Lucy have altogether?
Tom has 5 toy cars 🚗 and his dad gives him 2 more. How many toy cars does Tom have in total?
There are 6 birds 🐦 on a tree. 3 more birds fly over and join them. How many birds are there altogether?
Mia has 4 red balloons 🎈 and 5 blue balloons. How many balloons does she have in all?
There are 7 fish 🐟 in a tank. 3 more fish are added. How many fish are there now?
Lucy has 8 strawberries 🍓 and she eats 3. How many strawberries are left?
There are 10 balloons 🎈. The wind pops 4 of them. How many balloons are left?
Sam has 9 crayons 🖍️ and gives 2 to his friend. How many does Sam have left?
There were 7 ducks 🦆 in a pond. 3 ducks swam away. How many ducks are still in the pond?
Mia had 6 cookies 🍪 and ate 4. How many cookies does she have left?
There are 2 bags 🛍️. Each bag has 3 apples. How many apples are there altogether?
Each frog 🐸 has 4 legs. There are 2 frogs. How many legs altogether?
There are 3 boxes 📦. Each box has 2 toys inside. How many toys altogether?
A spider 🕷️ has 8 legs. There are 2 spiders. How many legs in total?
There are 5 flowers 🌸. Each flower has 2 leaves. How many leaves are there altogether?
Lucy has 8 grapes 🍇 and wants to share them equally between 2 friends. How many grapes does each friend get?
There are 6 biscuits 🍪 to share equally among 3 children. How many biscuits does each child get?
10 stickers ⭐ are shared equally between 2 children. How many stickers does each child get?
9 oranges 🍊 are put into 3 equal groups. How many oranges are in each group?
4 children want to share 8 toy cars 🚗 equally. How many cars does each child get?
Tom's pencil 📏 is 10 cm long. His pen is 7 cm long. How much longer is the pencil?
A baby elephant 🐘 weighs 5 kg. A dog 🐶 weighs 3 kg. How much heavier is the elephant?
Mia's bottle holds 1 litre of water 💧. Sam's bottle holds 2 litres. How many litres is that altogether?
A rope is 8 metres long. Tom cuts off 3 metres. How long is the rope now?
Lucy is 100 cm tall. Her little brother is 80 cm tall. How much taller is Lucy?
A triangle 🔺 has how many sides?
questions.hint: Count the sides of a triangle: 1, 2, 3!

questions.q: Which shape has 4 equal sides? Think of a window! 🟦
questions.hint: A shape with 4 equal sides is called a...?

questions.q: A circle ⭕ has how many corners?
questions.hint: A circle is round — it has NO corners!

questions.q: Which shape has 6 sides? Like a honeycomb! 🍯
A rectangle 🟥 has how many sides?
questions.hint: Count: top, bottom, left, right = 4 sides!
